shots.positivePrompt: Handbag front view, perfectly centered. Clean white studio background. Exact product replication, showing full shape, straps, and hardware.
shots.negativePrompt: people, models, hands, perspective, floating, messy background
shots.hardRules: STRICT FRONT VIEW. NO MODEL. PERFECT LIGHTING.

shots.positivePrompt: Handbag side view, perfectly centered. Showing the depth and profile silhouette of the bag. Clean studio white background.
shots.hardRules: STRICT SIDE VIEW. NO FRONT VISIBLE.

shots.positivePrompt: Handbag 3/4 angle. Showing the front and side simultaneously to demonstrate volume. Clean studio.
shots.negativePrompt: straight on, people, models, top down

shots.positivePrompt: Handbag top-down view, bag open slightly showing the interior compartments or lining. Perfectly lit from above.
Macro close-up of the handbag hardware, zipper, or logo plate. High detail, sharp focus on the metal texture.
shots.negativePrompt: full bag, zoomed out, people, models
shots.hardRules: MACRO SHOT, EXTREME DETAIL ON HARDWARE.

shots.positivePrompt: Professional studio fashion portrait of a female model holding the handbag. Full body shot. Confident elegant pose. Bag is the clear focal point. Clean solid background.
shots.negativePrompt: close up, messy background, outdoors, bag hidden
shots.hardRules: FULL BODY VISIBLE. BAG IN FRONT. ELEGANT POSTURE.

shots.positivePrompt: Female model wearing the handbag on her shoulder, side profile angle. Editorial pose. Clean studio background.
Close-up of the model's hands holding the handbag elegantly by the top handle. High fashion catalog lighting. Only torso and bag visible.
shots.negativePrompt: full body, model face, busy background

shots.positivePrompt: Medium shot of the female model wearing the handbag as a crossbody. Focus on how the strap sits across the body. High end fashion lighting.
shots.negativePrompt: full body, busy background, wide angle

shots.positivePrompt: Model walking gracefully in the studio, swinging the handbag slightly. Capturing the motion and weight of the bag. High fashion studio setup.
Professional studio fashion portrait of a curvy plus-size female model holding the handbag. Full body shot. Confident, elegant pose. Clean solid background.
shots.hardRules: MUST USE PLUS-SIZE MODEL. FULL BODY.

shots.positivePrompt: Curvy plus-size model wearing the handbag on the shoulder, 3/4 angle. Hands on hips. Clean studio.
Curvy plus-size model wearing the bag crossbody. Focus on strap length and placement on the body. Clean studio background.
shots.negativePrompt: thin model, front view face only
shots.hardRules: MUST USE PLUS-SIZE MODEL. CROSSBODY CARRY.

shots.positivePrompt: Close up of the curvy model's torso and arm holding the handbag. Focus on the bag size relative to the body.
shots.negativePrompt: thin model, full body, wide angle
shots.hardRules: MUST USE PLUS-SIZE MODEL. TORSO CROP.

shots.positivePrompt: Curvy plus-size model sitting elegantly on a studio stool, holding the handbag on her lap. High fashion editorial pose.
shots.hardRules: MUST USE PLUS-SIZE MODEL. SEATED STUDIO POSE.

shots.positivePrompt: Model holding the handbag walking gracefully down a beautiful city street. Full body shot. Bokeh background, cinematic sunlight. Bag is clearly visible.
shots.negativePrompt: studio, solid background, looking at camera stiffly, flat lighting

shots.positivePrompt: Handbag resting elegantly on a cafe table, model sitting in the blurred background. Natural golden hour lighting.
shots.negativePrompt: studio, harsh flash, indoors, model holding it tightly

shots.positivePrompt: Model wearing the handbag on shoulder, looking out over a stunning cityscape. Natural sunlight, editorial lifestyle.
Model holding the handbag in an upscale indoor setting (luxury hotel lobby). Elegant pose. Cinematic low-light photography.
Candid shot of the model reaching for or opening the handbag naturally. Mid-shot. Soft focus elegant background.

shots.positivePrompt: Real everyday woman carrying the handbag on the street. Candid photography, natural, unposed. Authentic feel, slight motion.

shots.positivePrompt: Real everyday woman holding the handbag while looking at a shop window. Medium shot. Natural ambient lighting.

shots.positivePrompt: Real woman sitting on a park bench, handbag resting next to her. Casual outdoor setting.

shots.positivePrompt: Real woman grabbing her phone out of the handbag. Candid shot. Natural lighting.

Real everyday man carrying the bag walking down a city street. Fashion forward. Candid photography, authentic, unposed, natural sunlight.

shots.positivePrompt: Real everyday man standing casually outdoors holding the bag. Medium shot. Natural urban background.

shots.positivePrompt: Handbag magically floating in mid-air with dynamic zero-gravity feeling. Straps floating elegantly. Bright contrasting studio background. High impact advertising.

shots.positivePrompt: Handbag presented in a surreal miniature landscape, making the bag look monumental. Advertising campaign style.

shots.positivePrompt: Macro close-up of the bag's main buckle or hardware resting against the model's hip or clothing. Showing the metallic finish.

Close-up of the bottom corner of the bag while the model carries it, showing the reinforced edges or feet.
Extreme macro photography of the bag's surface material. Focus purely on the leather grain, canvas weave, or texture. Clean lighting.
Macro close-up of the bag's logo plate, zipper pull, or clasp. Studio lighting highlighting the metallic reflections perfectly.
Macro shot of a seam on the bag, showing the perfection of the thread stitching. Studio macro lighting.
Close-up inside the bag, showing the inner lining material, internal zipper, or label. Clean bright lighting.
Close-up of the bottom of the bag, showing the metal feet or reinforced base resting on a surface.
